Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7004 0 0}I feel like it's not just my Persona abilities that were affected. I can't handle my weapon as well as I used to, either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}I guess battling is kind of like studying. You have to keep at it if you want to maintain a certain level of aptitude...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7062 0 0}We actually went back to the past...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}In a way, this feels far more dangerous than the Dark Hour. Don't you think so, too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7138 0 0}The view outside the window looks normal, but I can't shake this weird feeling...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}I can't exactly put my finger on it... For all I know, it could just be my imagination.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7077 0 0}Oh, are you worried about how I'm taking all of that? I'm honestly okay... That was so long ago now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7077 0 0}I think I figured out why I get this weird feeling whenever I look outside the window...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}Everything happens at the exact same time as the last, right on the dot. The same person passing by, the same car...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}And that's pretty scary when you start thinking about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7048 0 0}That figure... It doesn't seem like it wants a direct confrontation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}But what exactly does it want from us...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}You know, Junpei-san never really admits just how sad or hurt he is until it comes to a head.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}It kind of hit me how mature he can be... Especially considering how he's helped me through some stuff, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7132 0 0}I still think he ought to take things more seriously at times, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7078 0 0}I thought I understood how serious of a problem the Shadows are, but maybe it's even worse than I imagined...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}People getting caught up in accidents, having their minds consumed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}What even are the Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7048 0 0}And it's so weird that only Persona-users stand a chance against them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}Do you think Personas and Shadows may be related somehow...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}Right now, all we're doing is taking them out little by little. Maybe we need to stop and figure out what they really are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}That's just a thought, though... It's kind of hard to put it into words.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7117 0 0}Let's keep going. If there's really an answer to all this, then no doubt it'll be at the very end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}That's what I think, at least, so I'll keep pressing forward![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}Maybe... Maybe there really is some kind of secret behind these Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}Just a little further until we make it to the end... I wonder what we'll find there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}Maybe... Maybe there really is some kind of secret behind these Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}Same goes for that figure that keeps showing up. Why does Fuuka-san start acting weird whenever we see it...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}There's so much we don't know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 52 -1 0 0}It's not like I don't want him to come back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}But he made his choice, and... I want to try to understand his decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7082 0 0}That's why I'll be siding with Sanada-san on this. He feels the same way as I do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7096 0 0}I'm relieved we're all here, together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}I know I chose to split apart and fight for my side, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}The fact that we're in this as a team again puts me at ease.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}I'm still a little mad you didn't say anything about the key possibly being linked to your life, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}No wonder Metis was so determined to win.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}She'll do anything for the person she cares about the most, even if it means harming others in the process...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7010 0 0}Oh, Aigis-san. Do you have some time right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Fuuka-san and I have been using the {f 4 4 0 37 1 16784} we found to keep track of our supplies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}And I was wondering if you could lend us a hand? If you're okay with it, of course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time[n]with Amada-san...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}I was actually asked to buy some more supplies, but I don't think I'll be able to carry all of it by myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}So I'm glad you agreed to help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Then, um... If you find the time, could you come see me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}It's about the {f 4 4 0 37 1 16785} we found. Something's been bugging me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Do you remember how it was in tatters? I think it was just an ordinary mystery book, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}I was thinking about fixing it up. I'm pretty confident I can do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Let's work on it together whenever you have time. Just let me know if you're free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Remember that book we found while exploring? Could I talk about it with you?[n]{f 1 1}
